FH. 700( 37) adhe 26-11-1991, O15. 438( 91) ate 21-4-1992, BAP. $09( 31) TS 15-6-1994, BLATTH. 270( 33) aRTa 4-7-1996, MLA, 59( 84) atte 4-2-1997, aEaLAA. 719( 91) aa 15-10-1999, BaP 167(37) anther 29-2-2006, eaafa, $13(31) aha 9-7-2001, wa AA. 797(91) TTS 2-12-2002 stk ara, 384 athe 22 staqay, 2003 & ataria Safina fanw 7 863 GV2005 q) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [Parr II—Sac, 3()] MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (Railway Board) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th March, 2005 G.S.R. 173(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-scction (2) of Section 30 of the Railway Claims Tribunal Act, 1987 (34 of 1987), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, namely :— 1. (2) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2005. Q) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Inthe Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989,— (a) for sub-rule (1) of rule 3}, the following shall be substituted, namely :-— *“(1) The Tribunal, after hearing the applicant and respondent, shall pass an order cither at once, or as soonas thereafter, as may be practicable, but not later than twenty-one days from the date of conciusion of the arguments; and where it is unable so to do, it shall record its reasons for such inability.” (b) for sub-rule (2) of nule 32, the following shall be substituted, namely -—— “(2) Where it appears to the Tribunal that there is no sufficient ground for a review, it shall reject the application and record its reasons for so doing.” {F. No. 89/TC(RCTY 1-6 Pt/Rajya Sabha] BADRILAL MEENA, Executive Director/Public Grievances, Railway Board Note: The principal niles were published in the Gazette of India, vide number G.S.R. 842(E), dated the 19th September, 1989 and subsequently, amended vide Number G.S.R. 700(E), dated the 26th November, 1991,G.S.R. 438(E), dated the 21st April, 1992, G.S.R. 509 (E), dated the 15th June, 1994, G.S.R. 270(E), dated the 4th July, 1996, G.S.R. 59(E), dated the 4th February, 1997, G.S.R. 719(E), dated the 15th October, 1999, G.S.R. 167(E), dated the 29th February, 2000, GSR. 513(E), dated the 9th July, 2001, G.8.R. 787 (E), dated the 2nd December, 2002 and G.S.R. 384, dated the 22nd October, 2003, Printed by the Mana; Delbi-1 10064 and Fu -- 2 of 2 --
